title: Diplodoc (.yfmlint)

default.description: Default state for all rules. false disables all rules unless individually overridden.
default.markdownDescription:
**`boolean`** Default enabled state for **all** rules.

- `true` — all rules are enabled at their default level unless overridden
- `false` — all rules are disabled unless individually overridden

Useful for an allowlist approach: set `default: false`, then enable only specific rules.

log-levels.description: Override the log level for specific rules without changing their enabled state.
log-levels.markdownDescription:
**`object`** Override the log/severity level for specific rules.

Levels: `error` · `warn` · `info` · `disabled`

```yaml
log-levels:
  MD013: warn
  YFM003: error
```

MD001.description: heading-increment: Heading levels should only increment by one level at a time.
MD001.markdownDescription:
**`RuleValue`** **MD001** `heading-increment` — Heading levels must only increment by one level at a time.

Bad: `## H2` followed immediately by `#### H4`.

MD002.description: first-heading-h1: First heading should be a top-level heading.
MD002.markdownDescription: **`RuleValue`** **MD002** `first-heading-h1` — The first heading in a document must be a top-level `#` heading.

MD003.description: heading-style: Heading style should be consistent.
MD003.markdownDescription: **`RuleValue`** **MD003** `heading-style` — Heading style must be consistent throughout the document (atx `#` or setext `===`).

MD004.description: ul-style: Unordered list style should be consistent.
MD004.markdownDescription: **`RuleValue`** **MD004** `ul-style` — Unordered list marker style must be consistent (`-`, `*`, or `+`).

MD005.description: list-indent: Inconsistent indentation for list items at the same level.
MD005.markdownDescription: **`RuleValue`** list-indent: Inconsistent indentation for list items at the same level.

MD006.description: ul-start-left: Consider starting bulleted lists at the beginning of the line.
MD006.markdownDescription: **`RuleValue`** ul-start-left: Consider starting bulleted lists at the beginning of the line.

MD007.markdownDescription: **`RuleValue`** **MD007** `ul-indent` — Unordered list items must be indented consistently.

MD013.description: line-length: Line length should not exceed a maximum.
MD013.markdownDescription:
**`RuleValue`** **MD013** `line-length` — Lines must not exceed the configured maximum length (default: 80).

Often disabled in documentation projects.

MD014.description: commands-show-output: Dollar signs used before commands without showing output.
MD014.markdownDescription: **`RuleValue`** commands-show-output: Dollar signs used before commands without showing output.

MD018.description: no-missing-space-atx: No space after hash on atx style heading.
MD018.markdownDescription: **`RuleValue`** no-missing-space-atx: No space after hash on atx style heading.

MD019.description: no-multiple-space-atx: Multiple spaces after hash on atx style heading.
MD019.markdownDescription: **`RuleValue`** no-multiple-space-atx: Multiple spaces after hash on atx style heading.

MD020.description: no-missing-space-closed-atx: No space inside hashes on closed atx style heading.
MD020.markdownDescription: **`RuleValue`** no-missing-space-closed-atx: No space inside hashes on closed atx style heading.

MD021.description: no-multiple-space-closed-atx: Multiple spaces inside hashes on closed atx style heading.
MD021.markdownDescription: **`RuleValue`** no-multiple-space-closed-atx: Multiple spaces inside hashes on closed atx style heading.

MD022.description: blanks-around-headings: Headings should be surrounded by blank lines.
MD022.markdownDescription: **`RuleValue`** **MD022** `blanks-around-headings` — Headings must have a blank line before and after them.

MD023.description: heading-start-left: Headings must start at the beginning of the line.
MD023.markdownDescription: **`RuleValue`** heading-start-left: Headings must start at the beginning of the line.

MD024.description: no-duplicate-heading: Multiple headings with the same content.
MD024.markdownDescription: **`RuleValue`** **MD024** `no-duplicate-heading` — Document must not have multiple headings with identical text.

MD025.description: single-h1: Only one top-level heading per document.
MD025.markdownDescription: **`RuleValue`** **MD025** `single-h1` — Each document should have exactly one `#` top-level heading.

MD027.description: no-multiple-space-blockquote: Multiple spaces after blockquote symbol.
MD027.markdownDescription: **`RuleValue`** no-multiple-space-blockquote: Multiple spaces after blockquote symbol.

MD031.description: blanks-around-fences: Fenced code blocks should be surrounded by blank lines.
MD031.markdownDescription: **`RuleValue`** blanks-around-fences: Fenced code blocks should be surrounded by blank lines.

MD032.description: blanks-around-lists: Lists should be surrounded by blank lines.
MD032.markdownDescription: **`RuleValue`** blanks-around-lists: Lists should be surrounded by blank lines.

MD033.description: no-inline-html: Inline HTML is controlled by allowHtml config.
MD033.markdownDescription: **`RuleValue`** **MD033** `no-inline-html` — Raw HTML tags inside Markdown. Controlled automatically by the `allowHtml` build config.

MD036.description: no-emphasis-as-heading: Emphasis used instead of a heading.
MD036.markdownDescription: **`RuleValue`** no-emphasis-as-heading: Emphasis used instead of a heading.

MD038.description: no-space-in-code: Spaces inside code span elements.
MD038.markdownDescription: **`RuleValue`** no-space-in-code: Spaces inside code span elements.

MD040.description: fenced-code-language: Fenced code blocks should declare a language.
MD040.markdownDescription:
**`RuleValue`** **MD040** `fenced-code-language` — Fenced code blocks should specify a language for syntax highlighting.

````md
```javascript
const x = 1;
```
````

MD041.description: first-line-h1: First line should be a top-level heading.
MD041.markdownDescription:
**`RuleValue`** **MD041** `first-line-h1` — The first line of the document should be a `#` heading.

Often disabled when pages use frontmatter `title`.

MD044.description: proper-names: Proper names should have the correct capitalization.
MD044.markdownDescription: **`RuleValue`** proper-names: Proper names should have the correct capitalization.

MD045.description: no-alt-text: Images should have alternate text.
MD045.markdownDescription: **`RuleValue`** no-alt-text: Images should have alternate text.

MD047.description: single-trailing-newline: Files should end with a single newline character.
MD047.markdownDescription: **`RuleValue`** single-trailing-newline: Files should end with a single newline character.

YFM001.description: inline-code-length: Inline code span exceeds maximum length.
YFM001.markdownDescription:
**`boolean | LogLevel | object`** **YFM001** `inline-code-length` — Inline code spans must not exceed the maximum character length.

Object form lets you set `maximum`:
```yaml
YFM001:
  level: warn
  maximum: 100
```

YFM002.description: no-header-found-for-link: Link anchor references a heading that does not exist.
YFM002.markdownDescription: **`RuleValue`** **YFM002** `no-header-found-for-link` — Anchor fragments in links (e.g. `page.md#section`) must reference an existing heading.

YFM003.description: unreachable-link: Linked file does not exist or is not included in the TOC.
YFM003.markdownDescription: **`RuleValue`** **YFM003** `unreachable-link` — All internal links must point to files that exist **and** are reachable via the TOC.

YFM004.description: table-not-closed: YFM table block is missing a closing token.
YFM004.markdownDescription: **`RuleValue`** **YFM004** `table-not-closed` — Every `{% list type=... %}` table block must have a matching `{% endlist %}`.

YFM005.description: tab-list-not-closed: Tab list is missing a closing token.
YFM005.markdownDescription: **`RuleValue`** **YFM005** `tab-list-not-closed` — Every `{% list tabs %}` block must have a matching `{% endlist %}`.

YFM006.description: term-definition-duplicated: Same term is defined more than once.
YFM006.markdownDescription: **`RuleValue`** **YFM006** `term-definition-duplicated` — Each term (`[*key]: ...`) must be defined only once per file.

YFM007.description: term-used-without-definition: Term is referenced but never defined.
YFM007.markdownDescription: **`RuleValue`** **YFM007** `term-used-without-definition` — Every term reference (`{[key]}`) must have a corresponding definition.

YFM008.description: term-inside-definition-not-allowed: Term reference inside its own definition.
YFM008.markdownDescription: **`RuleValue`** **YFM008** `term-inside-definition-not-allowed` — A term definition must not reference itself.

YFM009.description: no-term-definition-in-content: Term definitions must be at the end of the file.
YFM009.markdownDescription: **`RuleValue`** **YFM009** `no-term-definition-in-content` — Term definitions (`[*key]: ...`) must appear at the **end** of the file, after all content.

YFM010.description: unreachable-autotitle-anchor: Auto-generated title anchor is unreachable.
YFM010.markdownDescription: **`RuleValue`** **YFM010** `unreachable-autotitle-anchor` — An auto-generated heading anchor is not reachable via any link in the project.

YFM011.description: max-svg-size: SVG file exceeds the maximum allowed file size.
YFM011.markdownDescription: **`RuleValue`** **YFM011** `max-svg-size` — SVG assets must not exceed the configured size limit (from `content.maxInlineSvgSize`).

YFM012.description: max-html-size: Output HTML file size exceeds the limit.
YFM012.markdownDescription: **`RuleValue`** **YFM012** `max-html-size` — Generated HTML page must not exceed the configured size limit (from `content.maxHtmlSize`).

YFM013.description: max-asset-size: Single asset file size exceeds the limit.
YFM013.markdownDescription: **`RuleValue`** **YFM013** `max-asset-size` — Asset files must not exceed the configured size limit (from `content.maxAssetSize`).

YFM014.description: anchor-as-filepath: Anchor used as file path in an include directive.
YFM014.markdownDescription: **`RuleValue`** **YFM014** `anchor-as-filepath` *(build-time)* — A `#anchor` fragment was mistakenly used as a file path in an `{% include %}` directive.

YFM015.description: anchor-not-found: Anchor referenced in an include was not found.
YFM015.markdownDescription: **`RuleValue`** **YFM015** `anchor-not-found` *(build-time)* — The anchor fragment specified in an include was not found in the target file.

YFM016.markdownDescription: **`RuleValue`** **YFM016** `self-include` *(build-time)* — A file must not include itself (circular include).

YFM017.description: invalid-frontmatter: Frontmatter block has invalid YAML (e.g. duplicated keys).
YFM017.markdownDescription: **`RuleValue`** **YFM017** `invalid-frontmatter` *(build-time)* — The frontmatter YAML block contains invalid syntax (e.g. duplicate mapping keys).

LogLevel.description: Rule severity level: error | warn | info | disabled.
markdownEnumDescriptions: **error** — rule violation causes the build to fail (exit code 1).
**warn** — rule violation is reported but the build succeeds.
**info** — rule violation is logged as information only.

RuleValue.description: Rule value: true/false, a log level string, or an object with level and rule-specific options.
RuleValue.markdownDescription:
**`boolean | LogLevel | object`** Rule configuration.

- `true` — enable at default level
- `false` — disable
- `'error'` / `'warn'` / `'info'` / `'disabled'` — set level
- Object — set level plus rule-specific options:
  ```yaml
  level: warn
  # rule-specific options here
  ```

markdownDescription:
YFM lint configuration file (`.yfmlint`).
Controls which Markdown and YFM rules are enabled and at what severity level.
```yaml # Disable all rules by default, then enable only what you need default: false MD013: false       # line-length — disable YFM003: warn       # unreachable-link — warn YFM001:
  level: error
  maximum: 80      # inline code max length
```
